revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[Health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_tree_all%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template displays a configurable showable list of subcategories, pages, images, or parent categories. ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|category tree all}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|category tree all|title}} – uses title as the category page name * {{tlx|category tree all|2=mode=categories or pages or all or parents|3=depth=0, 1 or more|4=hideroot=on or off|5=showcount=on or off|7=header=user-defined header}} – uses more of the categorytree tag parameters (see http://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CategoryTree for details): ** '''mode=pages''' displays only the pages in the category; '''mode=all''' displays subcategories, pages and images; '''mode=parents''' displays only the parent categories; mode is '''categories''' by default. ** '''depth=1''' displays one level of the tree; '''depth=2''' displays two levels of the tree, and so forth; depth is '''0''' by default. ** '''hideroot=on''' hides the root category; hideroot is '''off''' by default. ** '''showcount=off''' disables the (category, page, file) count after each category in the tree; showcount is '''on''' by default. ** '''header='''a user-defined header to override the default, for example "click '''+''' to show pages" ====Examples==== =====Subcategories, pages and images===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=all}} =====Subcategories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health}} {{category tree all|Health}} =====Parent categories===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents}} =====Header===== Code: {{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} >|{{category tree all|Health|mode=parents|header=Breadcrumb (start point)}} |-You are here: "[[:en:health|health]]" {{category tree all|Health|header=Breadcrumb (finish point)}} |> === See also === * {{tl|category tree}} * {{tl|Category tree both}} * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree all]] - {{tl|category tree all}} ported to Wikimedia Commons * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[la:Formula:Category tree all]] [[pt:Predefinição:Árvore de todas categorias]] [[ur:سانچہ:Category tree all]] }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
